# Faces.js: profile picture generator
> 

![Avatar appearance configurator](https://substack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com/public/images/ab613c0a-0e96-4af0-a034-a8f2d40af05f_1890x923.png "1456x711")

If you are currently building a service where you would like to have interesting default profile pictures for users, the [faces.js library](https://zengm.com/facesjs/) from ZenGM might come in handy. It was originally created for the game Basketball GM and allows you to build faces from many variables. In addition to the code, it [also offers an editor](https://zengm.com/facesjs/editor/#) where you can customize the avatar to your liking.
